companyOverview: Acme Corp builds developer tools used by thousands of teams. Interviews emphasize practical system design and collaboration with product.
hiringPsychology: They reward candidates who show curiosity about the product, admit trade-offs clearly, and connect past work to user impact.

roadmap.title: Company & role alignment
tasks: Read last 3 engineering blog posts and note themes
Rewrite your intro to map 3 resume bullets to the job description

roadmap.title: Technical depth
tasks: Solve 6 medium problems tagged for your stack
Whiteboard one feature from your resume with API + data model

roadmap.title: Interview simulation
tasks: Full mock: coding + system design + behavioral
Prepare 5 STAR stories tied to their values

technical: How would you design rate limiting for our public API?
Walk through how you optimized a slow query or endpoint.
Explain CAP as it applies to a service you built.
behavioral: Tell me about a time you disagreed with a product decision.
How do you prioritize when the roadmap shifts mid-sprint?
What would you improve in our product if you joined Monday?
